nasb.text: Eat anything that is sold in the meat market without asking questions for conscience’ sake;

esv.text: Eat whatever is sold in the meat market without raising any question on the ground of conscience.

cnv.text: 肉食市場所賣的一切，你們只管吃，不要為了良心的緣故問甚麼，

ccb.text: 市场上卖的肉，你们都可以吃，不必为良心的缘故而询问什么，

csbs.text: 肉市上所卖的一切，你们都可以吃；不要为了良心的缘故而问什么，
